sqlMap.select: select * from depobject where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into depobject(metaobjectno, structureno, metaobject, identifying navigate description seq developercomments helptext tiptext userdefineunittestcase ) values (#metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #metaobject#, #identifying# #navigate# #description# #seq# #developercomments# #helptext# #tiptext# #userdefineunittestcase# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('depobject') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select depobjectno, metaobject, identifying, navigate, description, seq, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, userdefineunittestcase, metaobjectno, structureno from depobject where depobjectno = #depobjectno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update depobject set
metaobject = #metaobject# metaobject = null identifying = #identifying# identifying = null navigate = #navigate# navigate = null description = #description# description = null seq = #seq# seq = null developercomments = #developercomments# developercomments = null helptext = #helptext# helptext = null tiptext = #tiptext# tiptext = null userdefineunittestcase = #userdefineunittestcase# userdefineunittestcase = null
where depobjectno = #depobjectno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from depobject where depobjectno = #depobjectno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from depobject where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select depobjectno, metaobject, identifying, navigate, description, seq, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, userdefineunittestcase, metaobjectno, structureno from depobject where depobjectno = #depobjectno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select depobjectno, metaobjectno, structureno, metaobject, identifying, navigate, seq from depobject where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
